
# Scientific Theories of the Origin of Life

## Overview

This chapter explores:

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Main Concepts

### 

### 

### 

## Notes

Add references, figures, equations, case studies, and discussions here.


## Suggested Sections

### Primordial Soup Hypothesis

### RNA World

### Metabolism-First Models

### Hydrothermal Vent Hypothesis

### Autocatalytic Systems

### LUCA

## Comparison Matrix

| Theory | Main Idea | Strengths | Limitations |
|---|---|---|---|
| RNA World |  |  |  |
| Hydrothermal Vents |  |  |  |
